title: VerdantVibes Unofficial Port
description: Adds tons of plants to enrich your world and homes! A fabric port of the mod VerdantVibes to 1.21 versions.
body:
## VerdantVibes Unofficial Port
- This fabric **Client- & Serverside** mod ports the [VerdantVibes Mod by Pandarix](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdantvibes) to 1.21 versions.
- The additions are identical to the **original mod**.

## Addition
### Blocks
- Gardening Table (The working Job site block for Gardener)
- Monstera
- Snake Plant
- Parlour Palm
- Money Tree
- Blue Lobelia
- Dragon Tree
- Candytuft
- Periwinkle
- Ivy

### Entity  
- Gardener (A villager profession that sells various of plants)

![Additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59987600ef3f9b0bd162c32469c716d75b6e0b92.png)

### World Generation
- Fairy Circle
![Fairy Circle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/610528ea0fe5133169986ff85e1b6ea926551ac7.png)
- Spruce Overgrown Hut  
![Spruce Overgrown Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01817f19dc45e41874f17b28bdaa2342c6379eb2.png)
- Oak Overgrown Hut
![Oak Overgrown Hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69fffbf7774f188dc141d775ac6e3096952e22a9.png)
- Palm Campfire  
![Palm Campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1e7bfe0a1fc20b2662834b20c555d869ba8cbe6.png)

### Vanilla-friendly Tab  
![Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0cdcfee170c5bc8d9d167fd308ea1af7e70b2d8.png)
